classification_policy.current_seed_policy: tracked six tests are current seeds
classification_policy.manual_current_policy: untracked tests may be promoted only by explicit manual audit when imports stay inside current closure and assertion intent is current

manual_current_tests.Iris/build/description/v2/tests/test_com: manual audit: imports only current closure module compose_layer3_text; asserts current compose overlay/render behavior; no ignored reproduction imports

manual audit: compose entrypoint guard hardening imports current closure module compose_layer3_text and asserts shared current write-boundary behavior; explicit historical preservation test remains historical-classified
manual_current_tests.Iris/build/description/v2/tests/test_lua: manual audit: imports current lua bridge exporter and asserts default chunk export contract, protected destination rejection, report schema, and historical/diagnostic monolith quarantine
manual_current_tests.Iris/build/description/v2/tests/test_run: manual audit: subprocess-only current-route guard over runtime payload shape; imports no tools.build module in-process and asserts no runtime payload mutation / no release claim

classification_policy.state_policy: legacy full discovery exit 0 makes collected identities ok unless _FailedTest appears
classification_policy.current_cutover_taxonomy_refresh: Added pytest-collected current DVF vNext evidence tests after current authority cutover; collection remains fail-closed for unknown future tests.
